# Assumption Log

## Purpose
Capture and validate key assumptions that underpin scope, schedule, cost, and benefits.

## Audience
Project Manager, Business Analyst, Risk Manager, Sponsors.

## Inputs
- Business case (`docs/templates/portfolio-program/business-case-template-cross-var3.md`).
- Project charter (`docs/templates/governance/project-charter-waterfall.md`).
- Scope baseline (`docs/templates/requirements/scope-baseline-cross.md`).

## Validation Guidance
- Define how each assumption will be tested (data source, experiment, stakeholder review).
- Assign a validity period and re-validate before major gates.
- Convert invalidated assumptions into risks or change requests.

## Assumption Log
| Assumption ID | Description | Rationale | Owner | Validity Period | Impact if False | Validation Method | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Each assumption includes rationale and validation method.
- [ ] Validity periods and owners assigned.
- [ ] Invalid assumptions are escalated to risks or change requests.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Assumptions are current, testable, and linked to project decisions.
- Validation status is reviewed at each governance milestone.
